Bash(PGPASSWORD=123 psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U postgres -d dbatemun -c "
SELECT table_name, 
       \(SELECT string_agg\(column_name || ' ' || data_type || CASE WHEN is_nullable='NO' THEN ' NN' ELSE '' END, ', ' ORDER BY ordinal_position\) 
        FROM information_schema.columns c2 
        WHERE c2.table_name = c1.table_name AND c2.table_schema='public'\)
FROM information_schema.tables c1
WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
ORDER BY table_name;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(find /var/www/servimun/app/Http/Controllers -type f -name "*.php" | sort && echo "---MODELS---" && find /var/www/servimun/app/Models -type f -name "*.php" 2>/dev/null | sort && echo "---MODELS APP---" && find /var/www/servimun/app -maxdepth 1 -name "*.php" | sort)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=123 psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U postgres -d dbatemun -c "
SELECT 
    tc.table_name, 
    kcu.column_name,
    ccu.table_name AS foreign_table_name,
    ccu.column_name AS foreign_column_name 
FROM information_schema.table_constraints AS tc 
    JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage AS kcu
      ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema
    JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage AS ccu
      ON ccu.constraint_name = tc.constraint_name AND ccu.table_schema = tc.table_schema
WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'FOREIGN KEY' AND tc.table_schema='public'
ORDER BY tc.table_name;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 - << 'EOF'
with open\('/var/www/servimun/app/Console/Commands/ActualizaEstadisticasAROCommand.php', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

old = """        // Construir consulta base
        $query = DB::table\('_videnuncias'\)
            ->where\('ambito_dependencia', 2\)
            ->orderByDesc\('id'\);"""

new = """        // Fecha de corte: solo denuncias desde el 18-11-2025 hasta hoy \(rango fijo de inicio\)
        $fechaCorte = '2025-11-18';

        // Construir consulta base
        $query = DB::table\('_videnuncias'\)
            ->where\('ambito_dependencia', 2\)
            ->whereDate\('fecha_ingreso', '>=', $fechaCorte\)
            ->whereDate\('fecha_ingreso', '<=', now\(\)\)
            ->orderByDesc\('id'\);"""

content = content.replace\(old, new\)

with open\('/var/www/servimun/app/Console/Commands/ActualizaEstadisticasAROCommand.php', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(content\)

print\("OK" if new in content else "FALLO"\)
EOF)
